pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh (line 12), export_result.sh (line 13), task.json description, and verifier.py (line 38). All references consistently use this path.
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 13), export_result.sh (line 14), task.json description (line 4), and verifier.py (line 39). Consistent across all task components.

Verified by code analysis: setup_task.sh contains exactly 5 bug planting sections (lines 46-172): Bug 1 (camera facing away, lines 46-78), Bug 2 (light energy to 0.0, lines 81-103), Bug 3 (resolution to 10x10, lines 106-123), Bug 4 (samples to 1, lines 126-147), Bug 5 (BaseCube hide_render to True, lines 150-172). README.md line 9 confirms '5 intentional bugs planted'.

Verified in verifier.py line 40 (default value), line 126 (threshold check: 'if max_energy > min_light_energy'), and README.md line 35 ('SunLight energy > 0.5'). The metadata value is the comparison threshold.

Verified in task.json description (line 3: 'resolution at least 1280x720'), README.md line 36 ('Render resolution >= 1280x720'), and verifier.py line 41 (default) and line 161 (threshold check). All sources consistently reference 1280x720 as minimum.

Verified in task.json description (line 3: 'render samples at least 16'), README.md line 37 ('Cycles samples >= 16'), and verifier.py line 42 (default) and line 193 (threshold check: 'elif samples >= min_samples'). Consistent minimum threshold.

Verified in setup_task.sh line 152 (object retrieval: 'bpy.data.objects.get('BaseCube')'), export_result.sh line 187 (same), README.md line 26 ('BaseCube has hide_render = True'), README.md line 38 (scoring table: 'BaseCube.hide_render is False'), and verifier.py line 43 (default target_object). Object name is consistent throughout all task components.

privileged_info_summary: The task debug_broken_render@1 is a synthetic Blender debugging exercise with 5 intentionally planted bugs: camera rotated to face away from scene with constraints removed, sun light energy set to 0.0, render resolution set to 10x10 pixels, Cycles samples set to 1, and BaseCube object set to hide_render=True. The task requires agents to fix these bugs and save outputs to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/fixed_scene.blend and /home/ga/BlenderProjects/fixed_render.png. Success criteria include achieving minimum resolution of 1280x720, minimum light energy greater than 0.5, minimum samples of 16, camera facing the scene, and BaseCube visibility in renders.
